section.heading: Program Executive Officer for Assured Access to Space

paragraph.content: There is a Program Executive Officer for Assured Access to Space within the Space Force.
The Program Executive Officer for Assured Access to Space shall serve a term of four years.

subsection.heading: Grade.—
subsection.content: The Program Executive Officer for Assured Access to Space, while so serving, shall have the grade of brigadier general, major general, lieutenant general, or general.

subsection.heading: Additional Duties.—
subsection.content: The Program Executive Officer for Assured Access to Space, while serving as the Program Executive Officer, shall also serve as the Commander of Space Launch Delta 45.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 119–60, div. A, title XVI, § 1601(b), Dec. 18, 2025, 139 Stat. 1173.)
